name: Gravekeeper's Visionary
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card by Tributing 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster. This card gains 200 ATK for each "Gravekeeper's" monster in your Graveyard. If this face-up card would be destroyed, you can discard 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster instead.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute Summon this card by Tributing 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster. This card gains 200 ATK for each "Gravekeeper's" monster in your Graveyard. If this face-up card would be destroyed, you can discard 1 "Gravekeeper's" monster instead.
